<div class="container-wrapper">
  <div class="article-container" id="article-container"><div class="table-of-contents"><div class="table-of-contents__wrapper"><h3 class="table-of-contents__title"></h3><ul class="table-of-contents__list" id="toc"><h2>On this page</h2><ul><li><a href="#h_01JCR55RJ03A6DHNT7TX141BX2">What is API Key?</a></li><li><a href="#h_01JCR55RJ0ZRJE3HVWXVE0BZ33">How to generate and authorize API Key</a></li><li><a href="#h_01JCR55RJ0B0PQW6HDW6RW0A42">Where can I get parameters (like tag ID)?</a></li><li><a href="#h_01JCR55RJ0E8SK91Q8772WGYQD">Is there any limit to the number of API calls?</a></li></ul></ul></div></div>
    <div id="table-of-contents__placeholder" data-heading="On this page"></div>
    <article id="main-content" class="article">
      <section class="article-info">
        
        
        <div class="article-content">
          <div class="article-body"><p>This article explains how to generate a token for the Manychat API and where to get parameters. The following questions will be covered:</p><ul>
<li data-list-item-id="e3543f310b9e095bd329fac52f8c83b64"><a href="#h_01JCR55RJ03A6DHNT7TX141BX2">What is API Key?</a></li>
<li data-list-item-id="e6a5b1c3d6b527fb13bf928860c2b1750"><a href="#h_01JCR55RJ0ZRJE3HVWXVE0BZ33">How to generate and authorize your token</a></li>
<li data-list-item-id="ee78c4498d0d2a77672388074f9763f98"><a href="#h_01JCR55RJ0B0PQW6HDW6RW0A42">Where can I get parameters (like tag ID)?</a></li>
<li data-list-item-id="ea0e08c2a7b37e68a49d96a3850313ae4"><a href="#h_01JCR55RJ0E8SK91Q8772WGYQD">Is there any limit to the number of API calls?</a></li>
</ul><p>The URL to the website listing all the API commands can be found <a href="https://api.manychat.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">here</a>.</p><h2 id="h_01JCR55RJ03A6DHNT7TX141BX2"><span style="color: #434343;">What is API Key? </span></h2><p>API Key is a code used to identify the user, developer, or calling program for a website. Manychat provides API Key (available on <a href="https://manychat.com/pricing" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">certain paid plans</a>) to use with the Account Public API. Public API Key can be found in <strong>Settings </strong><span style="color: #232b39;"><strong>→</strong></span><strong> API</strong>.</p><p>There is also a Profile Public API that's used for connection to non-bot-specific things like Templates. It requires a different key that can be found <a href="https://app.manychat.com/profile/dashboard#settings" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">here</a>.</p><h2 id="h_01JCR55RJ0ZRJE3HVWXVE0BZ33"><span style="color: #434343;">How to generate and authorize API Key</span></h2><p>To use the Manychat API, you need to generate an API Key. Navigate to <strong>Settings </strong><span style="color: #232b39;"><strong>→</strong></span><strong> API</strong> and click <strong>Generate your API Key</strong> button.</p><p><a href="https://help.manychat.com/hc/article_attachments/16931931702684" data-fancybox="gallery-1" data-caption="How to generate and authorize API Key"><img src="/hc/article_attachments/16931931702684" width="735" height="398"></a></p><p><strong>⚠️ Note: </strong>Refreshing and deleting your token will disable all connected API methods.</p><p><a href="https://help.manychat.com/hc/article_attachments/16931931703964" data-fancybox="gallery-1" data-caption="How to generate and authorize API Key"><img src="/hc/article_attachments/16931931703964" width="737" height="399"></a></p><p>After a successful token generation, you can use our Swagger to experiment with API. It is available <a href="https://api.manychat.com/swagger" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">here</a>. </p><p> </p><p>To add your token to Swagger, click the <strong>Authorize</strong> button:</p><p><a href="https://help.manychat.com/hc/article_attachments/16931917552284" data-fancybox="gallery-1" data-caption="How to generate and authorize API Key"><img src="/hc/article_attachments/16931917552284" width="742" height="402"></a></p><p>To authorize your token, paste your API Key as a Bearer value and click <strong>Authorize</strong>:</p><p><a href="https://help.manychat.com/hc/article_attachments/16931931709596" data-fancybox="gallery-1" data-caption="How to generate and authorize API Key"><img src="/hc/article_attachments/16931931709596" width="733" height="397"></a></p><p>You also can regenerate or delete your API Key in the Settings tab. </p><h2 id="h_01JCR55RJ0B0PQW6HDW6RW0A42"><span style="color: #434343;">Where can I get parameters (like tag ID)?</span></h2><p><strong>Contact ID</strong> can be found in a contact card in Contacts:</p><p><a href="https://help.manychat.com/hc/article_attachments/16931917555868" data-fancybox="gallery-2" data-caption="Where can I get parameters (like tag ID)?"><img src="/hc/article_attachments/16931917555868" width="739" height="417"></a></p><p><strong>Flow_ns</strong> can be found in your Automation URL in the address bar:</p><p><a href="https://help.manychat.com/hc/article_attachments/16931931712924" data-fancybox="gallery-2" data-caption="Where can I get parameters (like tag ID)?"><img src="/hc/article_attachments/16931931712924" width="717" height="426"></a></p><p><strong>Tag ID</strong> – use <a href="https://api.manychat.com/swagger#/Page/55f8b0c6040a20ba811a08eb4d92b9c2" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">/fb/page/getTags</a> API method to get a list of all Tag IDs. You can also find it in the interface by proceeding to <strong>Settings </strong><span style="color: #232b39;"><strong>→</strong></span><strong> Tags</strong> and hovering the cursor over the desired tag.</p><p><a href="https://help.manychat.com/hc/article_attachments/16931931716892" data-fancybox="gallery-2" data-caption="Where can I get parameters (like tag ID)?"><img src="/hc/article_attachments/16931931716892" width="732" height="413"></a></p><p><strong>Custom User Field ID</strong> – use <a href="https://api.manychat.com/swagger#/Page/2bc43834222da265c4c41fbd129d1392" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">/fb/page/getCustomFields</a> API method to get a list of all <span style="color: #444746;">User </span>Field IDs. You can also find it in the interface by proceeding to <strong>Settings </strong><span style="color: #232b39;"><strong>→</strong></span><strong> Fields </strong><span style="color: #232b39;"><strong>→</strong></span><strong> User Fields</strong> and hovering the cursor over the desired user field.</p><p><a href="https://help.manychat.com/hc/article_attachments/24016355270940" data-fancybox="gallery-2" data-caption="Where can I get parameters (like tag ID)?"><img src="/hc/article_attachments/24016355270940" alt="to-1.png" width="1600" height="903"></a></p><h2 id="h_01JCR55RJ0E8SK91Q8772WGYQD"><span style="color: #434343;">Is there any limit to the number of API calls?</span></h2><p>Yes, Manychat has a request-based limit. Refer to the table below for details. When you reach the limits, Manychat may stop processing requests for 24 hours.</p><figure class="wysiwyg-table wysiwyg-table-align-left" style="width: 100%;"><table style="border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 10px; border-style: solid; border-width: 1px;"><tbody>
<tr>
<td style="border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; padding: 10px; width: 80.8571%;">
<p><strong>PAGE</strong></p>
<p>/fb/page/getInfo</p>
<p>/fb/page/getTags</p>
<p>fb/page/getGrowthTools </p>
<p>/fb/page/getCustomFields </p>
<p>/fb/page/getOtnTopics</p>
<p>/fb/page/getBotFields </p>
</td>
<td style="border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; padding: 10px; width: 19%;">100RPS</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; padding: 10px; width: 80.8571%;">
<p><strong>PAGE</strong></p>
<p>/fb/page/getFlows</p>
</td>
<td style="border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; padding: 10px; width: 19%;">10RPS</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; padding: 10px; width: 80.8571%;">
<p><strong>PAGE</strong></p>
<p>/fb/page/createTag</p>
<p>/fb/page/removeTag</p>
<p>/fb/page/removeTagByName</p>
<p>/fb/page/createCustomField</p>
<p>/fb/page/createBotField</p>
<p>/fb/page/setBotField</p>
<p>/fb/page/setBotFieldByName</p>
<p>/fb/page/setBotFields</p>
</td>
<td style="border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; padding: 10px; width: 19%;">10RPS</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; padding: 10px; width: 80.8571%;">
<p><strong>SENDING</strong></p>
<p>/fb/sending/sendContent</p>
<p>/fb/sending/sendContentByUserRef</p>
<p>/fb/sending/sendFlow</p>
</td>
<td style="border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; padding: 10px; width: 19%;">25RPS</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; padding: 10px; width: 80.8571%;">
<p><strong>SUBSCRIBER</strong></p>
<p>/fb/subscriber/getInfo</p>
<p>/fb/subscriber/findByName</p>
<p>/fb/subscriber/findByCustomField</p>
</td>
<td style="border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; padding: 10px; width: 19%;">10RPS</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; padding: 10px; width: 80.8571%;">
<p><strong>SUBSCRIBER</strong></p>
<p>/fb/subscriber/findBySystemField</p>
</td>
<td style="border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; padding: 10px; width: 19%;">100RPS</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; padding: 10px; width: 80.8571%;">
<p><strong>SUBSCRIBER</strong></p>
<p>/fb/subscriber/addTag</p>
<p>/fb/subscriber/addTagByName</p>
<p>/fb/subscriber/removeTag</p>
<p>/fb/subscriber/removeTagByName</p>
<p>/fb/subscriber/setCustomField</p>
<p>/fb/subscriber/setCustomFields</p>
<p>/fb/subscriber/setCustomFieldByName</p>
<p>/fb/subscriber/verifyBySignedRequest</p>
<p>/fb/subscriber/createSubscriber</p>
<p>/fb/subscriber/updateSubscriber</p>
</td>
<td style="border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; padding: 10px; width: 19%;">10RPS</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table></figure><div> </div></div>
